utility_evaluation.REASONING:

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided showing flights (€120), accommodation (€380), activities (€135), restaurants (€85), and total (€720).

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details including costs. The package also meets the user's requirements: solo trip to Barcelona in Fall 2024 (October), under €900 budget (€720 total), and includes flights, accommodation, restaurants, and activities.
